nodes.label: AI as creative copywriting assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI for tasks requiring accuracy and final product
nodes.grounding_span: I have used it for brainstorming wording/titles/ copywriting type stuff mostly

nodes.label: AI as source of fragments to be massaged
nodes.label_negative: AI as provider of final product
nodes.grounding_span: Just using it to get fragments I can massage into something really good

nodes.label: Personal creation vs. editing/delegation
nodes.label_negative: Delegating creation to AI and editing its output
nodes.grounding_span: The more satisfying part of the work is the creation, not the editing/fixing

nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for creative or analytical work
nodes.grounding_span: I wouldn't be mad about an AI personal assistant for keeping a to-do list with deadlines

nodes.label: Creative satisfaction and enjoyment
nodes.grounding_span: I can get into a more focused and 'flow'-like state doing the work myself

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: very aware of the drawbacks of using a tool that can't be trusted to accurately cite its sources

nodes.label: Efficiency and cost reduction
nodes.grounding_span: I am not always great at being concise, so I can find it helpful for that

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for copywriting and ideation
nodes.grounding_span: I have used AI to help me come up with catchy titles and copywriting for library programs

nodes.label: Preference for delegating most tasks to AI
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to do things myself rather than reviewing and fixing someone else's work

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I wouldn't be mad about an AI personal assistant for keeping a to-do list with deadlines

nodes.label: Preference for direct creation and flow state
nodes.grounding_span: I can get into a more focused and 'flow'-like state doing the work myself

nodes.label: Hyper-focused discernment based on deep knowledge of AI limitations
nodes.grounding_span: I hyper-focus on the things I know that I can properly judge the AI's responses on
